cards.title: IG Reel 1 - Fear & Greed Index just hit 15
cards.copy:
Walk through what the Fear & Greed Index actually measures. Show the historical data: every time it has been below 20, what happened 12 months later. Not a prediction. Just data.

End with: The question is not whether Bitcoin recovers. It is whether you have a plan when it does.
cards.cta: Comment PLAN for free strategy breakdown (ManyChat)

cards.title: IG Reel 1 - Stop speculating. Start strategising.
cards.copy: The difference between a speculator and a strategist. Speculators react to price. Strategists react to their plan. One makes emotional decisions at the worst possible moments. The other has already decided what to do before the moment arrives.

cards.title: IG Reel 2 - This is how most people invest in digital assets
cards.copy: Act it out. Phone buzzing. Friend texts BTC is pumping. Buy at the top. Price drops. Panic. Sell at the bottom. Repeat. Then contrast with: here is how a framework changes everything. Same market. Different behaviour. Different outcome.
cards.cta: Link in bio to free training

cards.title: X - Speculation vs strategy comparison
cards.copy:
Speculation: Buy because the price went up. Sell because the price went down.

Strategy: Buy because the framework said accumulate at this level. Sell because the plan said rebalance at this target.

Same market. Same assets.

Completely different outcomes.

One is gambling. The other is investing.

cards.title: X - Best investors are the most boring
cards.copy:
The best investors I know are the most boring.

No hot takes. No next 100x. No checking prices at 3am.

They have a framework. They follow it. They sleep well.

That is the edge nobody talks about.

cards.title: LinkedIn - What is your process?
cards.copy:
There is a question I ask every person I speak with about digital assets.

What is your process?

Not what do you own. Not what is your portfolio worth. What is your process for making decisions.

90% of the time, the answer is some version of I read a lot and then make a call. That is not a process. That is intuition dressed up as research.

The difference between speculation and strategy is not knowledge. It is having a written plan you trust enough to follow when the market is screaming at you to do something different.

#DigitalAssets
